title: X(g) / Y(g) segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE geoms (id Int32, g String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE nodes (id Int32, g String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO nodes (id, g) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 'POINT(3 3'));
SELECT splitByChar(' ', g)[1] AS x FROM geoms UNION SELECT splitByChar(' ', g)[2] AS y FROM nodes WHERE g IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: selecting X(g) or Y(g) from geometry tables
